components.value: V, S, M/DF (a small bit of snakeskin)

area.value: one living creature that has the dragon type or the reptilian subtype

description.value: This spell slows the metabolism and other bodily functions of a creature for a short amount of time. The target is staggered and moves at half its normal speed (round down to the next 5-foot increment), but it can hold its breath for twice as long as normal.
